executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL URL RULES — READ CAREFULLY:
1. ALL API endpoints use prefix /v1/ (NOT /api/)
2. Tenant auth: POST /v1/auth/login
3. Backoffice auth: POST /v1/backoffice/auth/login (NOT /v1/auth/backoffice/login — the route is /v1/backoffice/auth/login)
4. NEVER use /api/ prefix except /api/ping

CREDENTIALS:
- Tenant: POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"}
- Backoffice: POST /v1/backoffice/auth/login with {"email":"superadmin@tukifact.net.pe","password":"SuperAdmin2026!"}

BACKOFFICE ENDPOINTS (all require backoffice token from /v1/backoffice/auth/login):
- /v1/backoffice/dashboard
- /v1/backoffice/tenants, /v1/backoffice/tenants/{id}
- /v1/backoffice/tenants/{id}/suspend, /v1/backoffice/tenants/{id}/activate
- /v1/backoffice/tenants/{id}/change-plan
- /v1/backoffice/tenants/{id}/impersonate
- /v1/backoffice/documents
- /v1/backoffice/employees, /v1/backoffice/employees/{id}
- /v1/backoffice/reports
- /v1/backoffice/config
- /v1/backoffice/activity-log

TENANT ENDPOINTS (all require tenant token from /v1/auth/login):
- /v1/documents, /v1/documents/{id}, /v1/documents/{id}/pdf, /v1/documents/{id}/xml, /v1/documents/{id}/void
- /v1/customers, /v1/customers/{id}
- /v1/products, /v1/products/{id}
- /v1/series, /v1/series/{id}
- /v1/dashboard
- /v1/quotations, /v1/quotations/{id}, /v1/quotations/{id}/status, /v1/quotations/{id}/convert-to-invoice
- /v1/recurring-invoices, /v1/recurring-invoices/{id}
- /v1/retentions, /v1/retentions/{id}
- /v1/perceptions, /v1/perceptions/{id}
- /v1/users, /v1/users/{id}
- /v1/api-keys, /v1/api-keys/{id}
- /v1/webhooks, /v1/webhooks/{id}
- /v1/tenant
- /v1/plans (public, no auth)
- /v1/audit-logs
- /v1/catalogs/{type}
- /v1/voided-documents
- /v1/despatch-advices, /v1/despatch-advices/{id}, /v1/despatch-advices/{id}/emit
- /v1/auth/register, /v1/auth/refresh, /v1/auth/me, /v1/auth/forgot-password, /v1/auth/reset-password

SERIES INFO:
- Factura (01): serie F001, id 56d175cb-df4d-46b7-a762-02a8e01a0adf
- Boleta (03): serie B001
- Nota Crédito (07): serie FC01
- Nota Débito (08): serie FD01
- Guía Remisión (09): serie T001
- Resumen Diario (20): serie R001
- Percepción (40): serie P001

TEST INDEPENDENCE:
- Each test creates its own data with unique timestamps: f"Test-{int(time.time())}"
- For documents: create customer + product first, then emit
- For credit/debit notes: emit a factura first, then reference it
- Series list returns JSON array directly (NOT wrapped in {data:[...]})
- DELETE on customers returns 204 (not 200). If 400, customer may have associated documents — that's OK, just assert 400 or 204.
- DELETE on quotations may return 405 if not supported — don't try to delete, just leave data.
- For despatch advice emit: if no certificate configured, 400/422/500 with signing error is EXPECTED — accept as PASS.
- For PDF/XML download: 200 or 404 both acceptable (depends on SUNAT signing).
